acceptance: BT completion, final result, and control-file cleanup depend on verified libtorrent completion state, not in-flight bytes.
verification: `testLibtorrentVerifiedProgressOverridesPieceStorage` proves libtorrent status overrides a fully marked native PieceStorage when libtorrent reports incomplete. `build/libtorrent-positive/aria2_tests` passed with `OK (1140)`.
notes: This closes the local logic side of the BT 99 percent false-completion bug; public tail smoke remains BTM-005.3.

acceptance: Existing RPC fields retain compatible names where possible and are populated from libtorrent state.
verification: `testGatherProgressLibtorrentStatus` proves totalLength, completedLength, speeds, uploadLength, connections, infoHash, and bittorrent.info.name come from libtorrent status. `build/libtorrent-positive/aria2_tests` passed with `OK (1140)`.
notes: No new public RPC field was required for this checkpoint.

acceptance: A torrent can finish from tail state without pause and restart releasing stale in-flight state.
verification: Debian netinst public smoke completed 755 MiB, returned RPC active result `[]`, and removed `.aria2` control files. Evidence summarized in progress.md.
notes: Raw smoke logs remain outside the repository.
